title: CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) Project Associate-II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR-NEERI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Technology from a recognized University AND 2 years’ experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services
qualification.details: Project Associate-II: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Technology from a recognized University AND 2 years’ experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 28,000/- + HRA (others) Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NEERI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the CSIR-NEERI Project Associate-II recruitment is 02 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-II post at CSIR-NEERI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or Technology from a recognized University and 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-II post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-II post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-II role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 35,000/- + HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates, and Rs. 28,000/- + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-II position?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR-NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR-NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article.
